theory.canonical_statement: ID4358 records Exceeds Spread Natural Frequencies Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `0_Incoming\Manual_Uploads\TXT_20260224_182616\185.txt` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: $ exceeds the spread in natural frequencies. In a simple case of two oscillators (or one oscillator’s spin vs orbit, as in tidal locking), the condition for phase-locking is \begin{equation} K ;>; |\omega_1 - \omega_2|,, \end{equation} meaning the coupling must be just larger than the frequency difference. In a marginal case $
